description: Elaboration test config. Modeled on gen_108_4_triplet_03125_004.json (108 bpm, 4/4, triplet subdivisions, 4 bars/cycle, base pitch G3=55, Gm-pentatonic bias) but for the elaboration pathway: drops stochastic-only keys and adds the division_* elaboration params. divisions_per_bar = 3*4 = 12; divisions_per_cycle = 12*4 = 48.
comment_change: Where to act each step (WEIGHT vector, used value/sum). Given at bar length 12, tiled across 4 bars. Biases changes toward strong divisions.
comment_rest: DIRECT probability (0..1) that a note-start or note-split second-half becomes a rest. Scalar => uniform across all divisions.
comment_start: DIRECT probability (0..1) that a division wants to be a note START rather than be sustained through. Extension (sustain-through) probability is 1 - this. High value => more onsets on that division. Scalar => uniform.
